mechanism_narrative: Positive short-run momentum in retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS is rising on a 3-month basis.
failure_condition: Reject if 3-month RSAFS growth has nonpositive Rank IC with 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year walk-forward window, or positive RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day returns in less than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing materially above its trailing trend signals a tightening shock that raises discount rates and reduces equity valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 12-month moving average by at least 0.50 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening episodes are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward instances or if the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll expansion and falling unemployment identify broad labor-market improvement that supports income growth and earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down state does not outperform either single-series signal over 20 trading days, or if its walk-forward hit rate for positive returns is below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals weakening real activity and operating leverage pressure on corporate earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO-decline triggers have average 20-day S&P 500 returns greater than or equal to unconditional average returns in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below their medium-term trend signal weaker construction demand and household confidence, reducing cyclically exposed earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average and its 3-month change is negative
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside-crossing episodes are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if downside triggers fail to underperform upside triggers.

mechanism_narrative: Disinflation combined with low policy rates lowers real discount-rate pressure without forcing restrictive policy, supporting equity valuation multiples and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth is below its 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS is below 1.00%
evidence_refs: fact:latest macro snapshot shows FEDFUNDS at 0.09
failure_condition: Reject if the disinflation-plus-low-rate interaction has no positive incremental coefficient over CPIAUCSL or FEDFUNDS alone, or if triggered 20-day returns are not above baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, prompting rapid risk reduction by equity investors and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE spike triggers are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations or if triggered returns are not below nontriggered returns.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth weakness combined with rising consumer prices identifies a stagflationary mix of softer cash-flow growth and higher discount-rate pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 year-over-year growth is below its 8-quarter median and CPIAUCSL year-over-year growth is above its 12-month median
failure_condition: Reject if the low-GDPC1 and high-CPIAUCSL interaction does not forecast lower 60-day returns than low-GDPC1 alone, or if its walk-forward coefficient is nonnegative in most rolling windows.
